tests.name: FilterSection starts with the add button disabled
FilterSection renders existing filter patterns
FilterSection shows an empty-state message when no custom filter patterns exist
FilterSection renders plugin defaults when plugin filter patterns are present
FilterSection adds a filter pattern on button click
FilterSection adds a filter pattern on enter
FilterSection disables the add button for whitespace-only input
FilterSection does not add a whitespace-only filter pattern on enter
FilterSection removes a filter pattern
FilterSection toggles orphan visibility
FilterSection decreases max files and clamps at one
FilterSection disables the decrease button at the minimum max-file value
FilterSection increases max files by one hundred
FilterSection commits max files on blur
FilterSection ignores non-numeric max-file input changes
FilterSection commits max files on enter
FilterSection does not commit max files for non-enter key presses
Patterns renders plugin defaults and custom patterns
Patterns renders the empty state and keeps the add button disabled for whitespace-only input
Patterns forwards add, delete, change, and enter-key events
Patterns allows custom patterns to be edited inline
OrphansToggle renders the show-orphans switch with the current value
OrphansToggle forwards switch changes
MaxFilesControl renders the current max-files value and disables decrease at one
MaxFilesControl forwards button and input events
filters controller exposes the current filter state from the graph store
filters controller adds trimmed patterns and clears the draft
filters controller deletes patterns from the store and posts the updated list
filters controller edits patterns in the store and posts the updated list
filters controller decreases max files by one hundred and clamps at one
filters controller increases max files by one hundred
filters controller updates max files optimistically for valid input changes only
filters controller commits parsed max files on blur and falls back to one for invalid values
filters controller publishes max-file updates on enter
filters controller ignores non-enter key presses for max-file input commits
filters controller updates orphan visibility and posts the new flag
filters patternActions adds normalized patterns and clears the draft value
filters patternActions ignores invalid draft patterns
filters patternActions removes a pattern and emits the update
filters patternActions edits an existing pattern and emits the update
filters patternActions ignores invalid edited patterns
filters patternActions skips edits that normalize back to the previous pattern
settingsPanel filter model only allows non-empty filter patterns after trimming
settingsPanel filter model clamps max files to at least one
settingsPanel filter model parses numeric max-file inputs and rejects invalid values
settingsPanel filter model decreases max files in steps of one hundred without going below one
settingsPanel filter model increases max files in steps of one hundred
settingsPanel filter model shows plugin filter patterns only when defaults are present
